heading: Payment Statuses
body:
If your credit card issuer is based in India, you might see two
additional [payment statuses](atlas/billing/invoices):

| Status            | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ----------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| PROCESSING        | The payment is pending due to RBI (Reserve Bank of India) regulations and might require authorization.A payment might stay in the processing state for several days. During this time, according to RBI (Reserve Bank of India) regulations, your card issuer will notify you of the charge and provide a link for you to revoke your mandate. No action is required unless the payment is for more than ₹15,000 INR (Indian Rupees).If the payment is for more than ₹15,000 INR (Indian Rupees), the notification you receive from your card issuer includes a link to authorize that payment. You must authorize the payment to successfully pay, otherwise the payment fails with the FAILED status.If you revoke your mandate, attempts to charge your credit card fail until you register a new mandate. Register a mandate by adding a payment method or retrying a payment |
| PENDING\_REVERSAL | The payment is pending, but will be refunded or cancelled as soon as possible.If the payment succeeds, MongoDB refunds it. If the payment fails, MongoDB cancels it.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

> **Important:** If you pay with a credit card from a credit card issuer based in
> India, you are charged in INR (Indian Rupees). However, the Atlas UI and
> MongoDB communications typically present prices in USD (United States Dollars).
>
> MongoDB uses the currency conversion rate at the time your payment
> moves to the `PROCESSING` status to convert between
> INR (Indian Rupees) and USD (United States Dollars).
